Po datos pabaigos WC * wc_scheduled_sales pats grazina _price. * - Batch zyme: _petshop_sale_batch, _petshop_sale_batch_label, * _petshop_sale_batch_applied_at, _petshop_sale_batch_rule. * - Remove PAGRINDINIS — pagal batch (tiksliai tos pacios prekes). Remove * pagal filtrus — tik advanced/fallback. * - Saugikliai: manual override skip by default (+ checkbox itraukti); * skip jei sale >= regular; skip jei regular <= 0; skip variable (+ flag); * jokio cron — tik rankinis dry-run/apply. * * MVP: tik simple products. Variations -> skip + flag. */ defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit; define( 'PETSHOP_PROMO_VERSION', '1.1' ); class Petshop_Bulk_Sales { const MK_BATCH = '_petshop_sale_batch'; const MK_LABEL = '_petshop_sale_batch_label'; const MK_APPLIED = '_petshop_sale_batch_applied_at'; const MK_RULE = '_petshop_sale_batch_rule'; const VAT = 1.21; // Filtru + taisykles laukai (perduodami is preview i apply per hidden inputs) private array $fields = [ 'ps_cat', 'ps_brand', 'ps_species', 'ps_source', 'ps_stock', 'ps_pmin', 'ps_pmax', 'ps_sku_in', 'ps_sku_ex', 'ps_incl_manual', 'ps_floor', 'ps_method', 'ps_value', 'ps_round', 'ps_from', 'ps_to', 'ps_label', ]; public function __construct() { add_action( 'admin_menu', [ $this, 'menu' ] ); add_action( 'admin_post_petshop_sale_apply', [ $this, 'handle_apply' ] ); add_action( 'admin_post_petshop_sale_remove_batch', [ $this, 'handle_remove_batch' ] ); add_action( 'admin_post_petshop_sale_remove_filters', [ $this, 'handle_remove_filters' ] ); add_action( 'admin_notices', [ $this, 'notices' ] ); } public function menu(): void { add_submenu_page( 'woocommerce', 'Masines akcijos', '🏷️ Masines akcijos', 'manage_woocommerce', 'petshop-promotions', [ $this, 'render' ] ); } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Filtru / taisykles skaitymas */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ private function read_filters( array $src ): array { return [ 'cat' => sanitize_title( $src['ps_cat'] ?? '' ), 'brand' => sanitize_title( $src['ps_brand'] ?? '' ), 'species' => sanitize_title( $src['ps_species'] ?? '' ), 'source' => sanitize_key( $src['ps_source'] ?? '' ), 'stock' => sanitize_key( $src['ps_stock'] ?? '' ), 'pmin' => ( isset( $src['ps_pmin'] ) && $src['ps_pmin'] !== '' ) ? (float) $src['ps_pmin'] : null, 'pmax' => ( isset( $src['ps_pmax'] ) && $src['ps_pmax'] !== '' ) ? (float) $src['ps_pmax'] : null, 'sku_in' => sanitize_text_field( $src['ps_sku_in'] ?? '' ), 'sku_ex' => sanitize_text_field( $src['ps_sku_ex'] ?? '' ), 'incl_manual' => ! empty( $src['ps_incl_manual'] ), 'floor' => isset( $src['ps_floor'] ) && $src['ps_floor'] !== '' ? (float) $src['ps_floor'] : 10.0, ]; } private function read_rule( array $src ): array { $method = sanitize_key( $src['ps_method'] ?? 'percent' ); if ( ! in_array( $method, [ 'percent', 'fixed_off', 'fixed_price' ], true ) ) { $method = 'percent'; } return [ 'method' => $method, 'value' => (float) ( $src['ps_value'] ?? 0 ), 'round' => ! empty( $src['ps_round'] ), 'from' => sanitize_text_field( $src['ps_from'] ?? '' ), 'to' => sanitize_text_field( $src['ps_to'] ?? '' ), 'label' => sanitize_text_field( $src['ps_label'] ?? '' ), ]; } private function rule_label( array $r ): string { $m = [ 'percent' => '-' . rtrim( rtrim( number_format( $r['value'], 2, '.', '' ), '0' ), '.' ) . '%', 'fixed_off' => '-' . number_format( $r['value'], 2 ) . ' EUR', 'fixed_price' => 'fiks. ' . number_format( $r['value'], 2 ) . ' EUR', ][ $r['method'] ] ?? ''; if ( $r['round'] ) { $m .= ' (.x9)'; } return $m; } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Produktu atranka */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ private function skus_to_ids( string $csv ): array { $ids = []; foreach ( array_filter( array_map( 'trim', explode( ',', $csv ) ) ) as $sku ) { $id = wc_get_product_id_by_sku( $sku ); if ( $id ) { $ids[] = $id; } } return $ids; } private function query_ids( array $f ): array { $args = [ 'post_type' => 'product', 'post_status' => [ 'publish', 'draft', 'private' ], 'posts_per_page' => -1, 'fields' => 'ids', ]; $tax = []; if ( $f['cat'] ) $tax[] = [ 'taxonomy' => 'product_cat', 'field' => 'slug', 'terms' => $f['cat'] ]; if ( $f['brand'] ) $tax[] = [ 'taxonomy' => 'product_brand', 'field' => 'slug', 'terms' => $f['brand'] ]; if ( $f['species'] ) $tax[] = [ 'taxonomy' => 'pa_gyvuno_rusis', 'field' => 'slug', 'terms' => $f['species'] ]; if ( $tax ) { if ( count( $tax ) > 1 ) { $tax['relation'] = 'AND'; } $args['tax_query'] = $tax; } $meta = []; if ( $f['stock'] ) $meta[] = [ 'key' => '_stock_status', 'value' => $f['stock'] ]; if ( $f['pmin'] !== null ) $meta[] = [ 'key' => '_price', 'value' => $f['pmin'], 'compare' => '>=', 'type' => 'NUMERIC' ]; if ( $f['pmax'] !== null ) $meta[] = [ 'key' => '_price', 'value' => $f['pmax'], 'compare' => '<=', 'type' => 'NUMERIC' ]; if ( $meta ) { if ( count( $meta ) > 1 ) { $meta['relation'] = 'AND'; } $args['meta_query'] = $meta; } if ( $f['sku_in'] !== '' ) { $in = $this->skus_to_ids( $f['sku_in'] ); $args['post__in'] = $in ?: [ 0 ]; // [0] = nieko, jei SKU nerasti } if ( $f['sku_ex'] !== '' ) { $ex = $this->skus_to_ids( $f['sku_ex'] ); if ( $ex ) { $args['post__not_in'] = $ex; } } $ids = get_posts( $args ); // Fulfillment source filtras (runtime, PHP pusėje) if ( $f['source'] && class_exists( 'Petshop_Fulfillment_Source' ) ) { $ids = array_values( array_filter( $ids, function ( $id ) use ( $f ) { $r = Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve( $id ); return ( $r['source'] ?? '' ) === $f['source']; } ) ); } return $ids; } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Sale skaiciavimas */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ private function compute_sale( float $regular, array $rule ): float { if ( $regular <= 0 ) { return 0.0; } switch ( $rule['method'] ) { case 'percent': $sale = $regular * ( 1 - $rule['value'] / 100 ); break; case 'fixed_off': $sale = $regular - $rule['value']; break; case 'fixed_price': $sale = $rule['value']; break; default: $sale = 0.0; } if ( $sale < 0 ) { $sale = 0.0; } if ( $rule['round'] && $sale > 0 ) { $sale = $this->floor_x9( $sale ); } return round( $sale, 2 ); } // Apvalina ZEMYN i artimiausia .x9 (sale niekada nepakyla virs paskaiciuotos). private function floor_x9( float $p ): float { $cents = (int) round( $p * 100 ); if ( $cents % 10 === 9 ) { return $cents / 100; } $cand = intdiv( $cents, 10 ) * 10 + 9 - 10; // ankstesne x9 if ( $cand < 1 ) { $cand = $cents; } return $cand / 100; } private function product_cost_net( int $pid ): ?float { if ( ! class_exists( 'Petshop_Product_Cost_Resolver' ) ) { return null; } $c = Petshop_Product_Cost_Resolver::resolve( $pid ); $cn = $c['cost_net'] ?? null; return ( $cn = (float) $cn ) > 0 ? $cn : null; } private function source_label( int $pid ): string { if ( ! class_exists( 'Petshop_Fulfillment_Source' ) ) { return ''; } $r = Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve( $pid ); return (string) ( $r['source'] ?? '' ); } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Dry-run eilutes */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ private function build_rows( array $f, array $rule ): array { $ids = $this->query_ids( $f ); $rows = []; $summary = [ 'matched' => count( $ids ), 'apply' => 0, 'skip_manual' => 0, 'skip_no_regular' => 0, 'skip_sale_ge' => 0, 'skip_sale0' => 0, 'skip_variable' => 0, 'margin_warn' => 0, ]; foreach ( $ids as $pid ) { $product = wc_get_product( $pid ); if ( ! $product ) { continue; } $sku = $product->get_sku(); $title = $product->get_name(); $src = $this->source_label( $pid ); if ( $product->is_type( 'variable' ) ) { $summary['skip_variable']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src' ) + [ 'regular' => 0, 'cur' => 0, 'sale' => 0, 'disc' => 0, 'margin' => null, 'mflag' => false, 'action' => 'skip-variable' ]; continue; } $regular = (float) $product->get_regular_price(); if ( $regular <= 0 ) { $regular = (float) $product->get_price(); } $cur = (float) $product->get_price(); $manual = ( get_post_meta( $pid, '_manual_price_override', true ) === 'yes' || get_post_meta( $pid, '_petshop_lock_pricing', true ) === 'yes' ); if ( $manual && ! $f['incl_manual'] ) { $summary['skip_manual']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src', 'regular', 'cur' ) + [ 'sale' => 0, 'disc' => 0, 'margin' => null, 'mflag' => false, 'action' => 'skip-manual' ]; continue; } if ( $regular <= 0 ) { $summary['skip_no_regular']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src', 'regular', 'cur' ) + [ 'sale' => 0, 'disc' => 0, 'margin' => null, 'mflag' => false, 'action' => 'skip-regular0' ]; continue; } $sale = $this->compute_sale( $regular, $rule ); if ( $sale <= 0 ) { $summary['skip_sale0']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src', 'regular', 'cur' ) + [ 'sale' => 0, 'disc' => 0, 'margin' => null, 'mflag' => false, 'action' => 'skip-sale0' ]; continue; } if ( $sale >= $regular ) { $summary['skip_sale_ge']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src', 'regular', 'cur', 'sale' ) + [ 'disc' => 0, 'margin' => null, 'mflag' => false, 'action' => 'skip-sale>=regular' ]; continue; } $margin = null; $mflag = false; $cost = $this->product_cost_net( $pid ); if ( $cost !== null ) { $margin = ( ( $sale / self::VAT ) - $cost ) / $cost * 100; if ( $margin < $f['floor'] ) { $mflag = true; $summary['margin_warn']++; } } $disc = ( $regular - $sale ) / $regular * 100; $summary['apply']++; $rows[] = compact( 'pid', 'sku', 'title', 'src', 'regular', 'cur', 'sale', 'disc', 'margin', 'mflag' ) + [ 'action' => 'apply' ]; } return [ 'rows' => $rows, 'summary' => $summary ]; } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Render */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ private function term_options( string $tax, string $selected ): string { $out = ''; $terms = get_terms( [ 'taxonomy' => $tax, 'hide_empty' => false ] ); if ( is_wp_error( $terms ) ) { return $out; } foreach ( $terms as $t ) { $out .= sprintf( '', esc_attr( $t->slug ), selected( $selected, $t->slug, false ), esc_html( $t->name ), (int) $t->count ); } return $out; } public function render(): void { if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_woocommerce' ) ) { wp_die( 'Prieiga draudziama' ); } $is_preview = ( ( $_POST['ps_action'] ?? '' ) === 'preview' ); $f = $this->read_filters( $is_preview ? $_POST : [] ); $rule = $this->read_rule( $is_preview ? $_POST : [] ); ?>

🏷️ Masines akcijos v

Filtrai atrenka prekes -> dry-run -> apply su patvirtinimu. Sale rasoma kaip WooCommerce akcija (regular nelieciamas). Remove — pagal akcijos batch. Tik simple prekes.

1. Atranka (filtrai)

Kategorija Brandas
Gyvuno rusis Fulfillment source
Stock status Kainos diapazonas (EUR)
SKU include SKU exclude

2. Akcijos taisykle

Metodas      
Reiksme (% arba EUR, priklausomai nuo metodo)
Sale datos (nebutina) nuo iki — WC pats grazina kaina pasibaigus

3. Saugikliai ir batch

Marzos riba (floor %) flaginti, jei sale marza zemiau
Manual override
Akcijos pavadinimas (batch zyme remove'ui)

'_' . wp_rand( 100, 999 ); $rule_json = wp_json_encode( [ 'method' => $rule['method'], 'value' => $rule['value'], 'round' => $rule['round'], 'from' => $rule['from'], 'to' => $rule['to'], ] ); $applied = 0; foreach ( $selected as $pid ) { $product = wc_get_product( $pid ); if ( ! $product || $product->get_type() !== 'simple' ) { continue; } $regular = (float) $product->get_regular_price(); if ( $regular <= 0 ) { $regular = (float) $product->get_price(); } $manual = ( get_post_meta( $pid, '_manual_price_override', true ) === 'yes' || get_post_meta( $pid, '_petshop_lock_pricing', true ) === 'yes' ); if ( ( $manual && ! $f['incl_manual'] ) || $regular <= 0 ) { continue; } $sale = $this->compute_sale( $regular, $rule ); if ( $sale <= 0 || $sale >= $regular ) { continue; } $product->set_sale_price( (string) $sale ); $product->set_date_on_sale_from( $rule['from'] ?: null ); $product->set_date_on_sale_to( $rule['to'] ?: null ); $product->update_meta_data( self::MK_BATCH, $batch ); $product->update_meta_data( self::MK_LABEL, $rule['label'] ); $product->update_meta_data( self::MK_APPLIED, current_time( 'mysql' ) ); $product->update_meta_data( self::MK_RULE, $rule_json ); $product->save(); // WC: _price, transients, lookup table wc_delete_product_transients( $pid ); $applied++; } $this->redirect( [ 'sale_applied' => $applied ] ); } public function handle_remove_batch(): void { if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_woocommerce' ) ) { wp_die( 'Prieiga draudziama' ); } if ( ! check_admin_referer( 'petshop_sale_remove_batch' ) ) { wp_die( 'Klaida' ); } $batch = sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_POST['ps_batch'] ?? '' ) ); if ( $batch === '' ) { $this->redirect( [ 'sale_err' => 1 ] ); } $ids = get_posts( [ 'post_type' => 'product', 'post_status' => 'any', 'posts_per_page' => -1, 'fields' => 'ids', 'meta_query' => [ [ 'key' => self::MK_BATCH, 'value' => $batch ] ], ] ); $removed = 0; foreach ( $ids as $pid ) { $this->clear_sale( $pid ); $removed++; } $this->redirect( [ 'sale_removed' => $removed ] ); } public function handle_remove_filters(): void { if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_woocommerce' ) ) { wp_die( 'Prieiga draudziama' ); } if ( ! check_admin_referer( 'petshop_sale_remove_filters' ) ) { wp_die( 'Klaida' ); } $f = $this->read_filters( $_POST ); $removed = 0; foreach ( $this->query_ids( $f ) as $pid ) { $p = wc_get_product( $pid ); if ( $p && ! $p->is_type( 'variable' ) && $p->get_sale_price() !== '' ) { $this->clear_sale( $pid ); $removed++; } } $this->redirect( [ 'sale_removed' => $removed ] ); } private function clear_sale( int $pid ): void { $product = wc_get_product( $pid ); if ( ! $product ) { return; } $product->set_sale_price( '' ); $product->set_date_on_sale_from( null ); $product->set_date_on_sale_to( null ); $product->delete_meta_data( self::MK_BATCH ); $product->delete_meta_data( self::MK_LABEL ); $product->delete_meta_data( self::MK_APPLIED ); $product->delete_meta_data( self::MK_RULE ); $product->save(); wc_delete_product_transients( $pid ); } private function redirect( array $args ): void { wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg( array_merge( [ 'page' => 'petshop-promotions' ], $args ), admin_url( 'admin.php' ) ) ); exit; } public function notices(): void { if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_woocommerce' ) || ( $_GET['page'] ?? '' ) !== 'petshop-promotions' ) { return; } if ( isset( $_GET['sale_applied'] ) ) { echo '

in_array() FALSE * -> visi kompanionai praleidziami (continue). * * SPRENDIMAS: nauja is_valid_companion($main,$cid) — patikrina ar preke * APSKRITAI leidziama kaip kompanionas (kategorija + fulfillment source + * rankinis override), BE shuffle ir BE limito. ajax_add() naudoja sia * patikra vietoj get_companions(). get_companions() lieka TIK rodymui. * * v1.4.2 (2026-06-08): Fulfillment source ribojimas auto kompanionams (S74) * * PROBLEMA: auto "dazniausiai perkama kartu" galejo siulyti kompanionus is * skirtingu sandeliu (pvz. prie VF prekes — ZB skanesta). Bundle su nuolaida * tampa logistiniu chaosu: dvi atskiros dropship siuntos is skirtingu sandeliu. * * SPRENDIMAS: get_companions() AUTO saka dabar filtruoja kandidatus per * Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve() — kompaniono source turi sutapti su * pagrindines prekes source. * VF -> tik VF, ZB -> tik ZB, Quattro -> tik Quattro, * Belacor/Tofu -> tik Belacor, Legacy -> tik Legacy. * Ambrosia / Prins -> auto FBT israijungtas (maistas, mazas pasirinkimas). * * RANKINIS override (_petshop_fbt_ids) NEFILTRUOJAMAS — samoningas savininko * sprendimas gali apimti kita sandeli. * * JOKIO FALLBACK: jei nera to paties source kandidatu — sekcija nerodoma * (geriau nieko, nei blogas cross-source bundle). * * Saugiklis: jei Petshop_Fulfillment_Source klase neikrauta (petshop-xml off), * filtras praleidziamas (graceful degradation, ne fatal error). */ if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) exit; class Petshop_FBT { const META_IDS = '_petshop_fbt_ids'; const CART_FLAG = 'petshop_fbt'; const CART_BASE = 'petshop_fbt_base'; const CART_MAIN = 'petshop_fbt_main'; public function __construct() { add_action( 'add_meta_boxes', [ $this, 'add_meta_box' ] ); add_action( 'save_post_product', [ $this, 'save_meta_box' ] ); add_action( 'admin_enqueue_scripts', [ $this, 'admin_assets' ] ); add_action( 'admin_menu', [ $this, 'settings_page' ] ); add_action( 'woocommerce_after_add_to_cart_form', [ $this, 'render_widget' ], 20 ); add_action( 'wp_enqueue_scripts', [ $this, 'frontend_assets' ] ); add_action( 'wp_ajax_petshop_fbt_add', [ $this, 'ajax_add' ] ); add_action( 'wp_ajax_nopriv_petshop_fbt_add', [ $this, 'ajax_add' ] ); add_action( 'woocommerce_before_calculate_totals', [ $this, 'apply_discount' ], 20 ); add_filter( 'woocommerce_get_item_data', [ $this, 'cart_item_label' ], 10, 2 ); add_filter( 'woocommerce_get_cart_item_from_session', [ $this, 'restore_cart_item' ], 10, 2 ); } /* ===================== HELPERIAI ===================== */ private function opt( $key, $default = '' ) { $o = get_option( 'petshop_fbt_settings', [] ); return isset( $o[ $key ] ) && $o[ $key ] !== '' ? $o[ $key ] : $default; } private function cat_rules() { $r = get_option( 'petshop_fbt_cat_rules', [] ); return is_array($r)?$r:[]; } private function pairs() { $p = get_option( 'petshop_fbt_pairs', [] ); return is_array($p)?$p:[]; } private function product_cat_slugs( $pid ) { $terms = get_the_terms( $pid, 'product_cat' ); $out = []; if ( $terms && ! is_wp_error( $terms ) ) foreach ( $terms as $t ) $out[] = $t->slug; return $out; } /* ===================== NUSTATYMAI ===================== */ public function settings_page() { add_submenu_page( 'woocommerce', 'Dažnai perkama kartu', 'Dažnai perkama kartu', 'manage_woocommerce', 'petshop-fbt', [ $this, 'settings_html' ] ); } public function settings_html() { if ( isset( $_POST['petshop_fbt_save'] ) && check_admin_referer( 'petshop_fbt_settings' ) ) { update_option( 'petshop_fbt_settings', [ 'enabled' => isset($_POST['enabled']) ? Tuščia = auto pagal kategorijų poras (tik to paties sandėlio prekės). Pasirink prekes, jei nori perrašyti auto — rankinis pasirinkimas NEFILTRUOJAMAS pagal sandėlį.

post_type==='product' ) { wp_enqueue_script('wc-enhanced-select'); wp_enqueue_style('woocommerce_admin_styles', WC()->plugin_url().'/assets/css/admin.css'); } } /* ===================== KOMPANIONAI ===================== */ // v1.4.3: bendras helperis — ar preke naudoja RANKINI override? private function manual_companion_ids( $product_id ) { $manual = array_values(array_filter(array_map('absint',(array)get_post_meta($product_id,self::META_IDS,true)))); if ( empty($manual) ) return []; $ids=[]; foreach ($manual as $id){ $p=wc_get_product($id); if ($p && $p->is_in_stock() && $p->is_purchasable() && $p->get_status()==='publish') $ids[]=$id; } return $ids; } // v1.4.3: pagrindines prekes fulfillment source + ar auto FBT israijungtas (ambrosia/prins) // Grazina ['source'=>..., 'auto_off'=>bool, 'filter'=>bool] private function main_source_info( $product_id ) { $info = [ 'source' => null, 'auto_off' => false, 'filter' => false ]; if ( class_exists('Petshop_Fulfillment_Source') ) { $resolved = Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve( (int) $product_id ); $info['source'] = isset($resolved['source']) ? $resolved['source'] : null; $info['filter'] = ( $info['source'] !== null ); if ( in_array( $info['source'], [ 'ambrosia', 'prins' ], true ) ) { $info['auto_off'] = true; } } return $info; } // v1.4.3: kategorijos, kurios yra leidziami AUTO kompanionai pagrindinei prekei private function companion_cat_slugs( $product_id ) { $pairs = $this->pairs(); if ( empty($pairs) ) return []; $my_cats = $this->product_cat_slugs($product_id); $comp_cats = []; foreach ( $pairs as $main=>$comps ) { if ( in_array($main,$my_cats,true) ) $comp_cats = array_merge($comp_cats,$comps); } return array_values(array_unique($comp_cats)); } /** * v1.4.3: PATIKRA (ne random) — ar $cid yra leidziamas kompanionas $main prekei. * Naudojama ajax_add() metu. BE shuffle, BE limito — stabilus rezultatas. * * Logika atitinka get_companions() taisykles: * 1. Rankinis override -> $cid turi but tarp override ID (source NEfiltruojamas). * 2. Auto -> $cid kategorija turi but tarp companion_cat_slugs IR * (jei source filtras aktyvus) source turi sutapti su pagrindines. * Ambrosia/prins pagrindine -> auto OFF -> jokiu auto kompanionu. */ private function is_valid_companion( $main_id, $cid ) { $cid = (int) $cid; if ( $cid <= 0 || $cid === (int) $main_id ) return false; $cp = wc_get_product( $cid ); if ( ! $cp || ! $cp->is_purchasable() || ! $cp->is_in_stock() ) return false; if ( $cp->get_status() !== 'publish' ) return false; // 1) Rankinis override — source NEfiltruojamas. $manual = $this->manual_companion_ids( $main_id ); if ( ! empty($manual) ) { return in_array( $cid, $manual, true ); } // 2) Auto pagal kategoriju poras $src = $this->main_source_info( $main_id ); if ( $src['auto_off'] ) return false; // ambrosia/prins -> jokiu auto kompanionu $comp_cats = $this->companion_cat_slugs( $main_id ); if ( empty($comp_cats) ) return false; // $cid kategorija turi but tarp leidziamu companion kategoriju $cid_cats = $this->product_cat_slugs( $cid ); if ( ! array_intersect( $cid_cats, $comp_cats ) ) return false; // Source filtras (S74): kompaniono source turi sutapti su pagrindines if ( $src['filter'] && class_exists('Petshop_Fulfillment_Source') ) { $cand = Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve( $cid ); $cand_source = isset($cand['source']) ? $cand['source'] : null; if ( $cand_source !== $src['source'] ) return false; } return true; } private function get_companions( $product_id ) { // 1) Rankinis override — NEFILTRUOJAMAS pagal fulfillment source. // Samoningas savininko sprendimas gali apimti kita sandeli. $manual = $this->manual_companion_ids( $product_id ); if ( ! empty($manual) ) { return $manual; } // 2) Auto pagal kategorijų poras // v1.4.2: fulfillment source ribojimas (S74) $src = $this->main_source_info( $product_id ); $main_source = $src['source']; $filter_by_source = $src['filter']; // Ambrosia / Prins: auto FBT israijungtas (tik maistas, mazas pasirinkimas). // Rankinis override (1 saka auksciau) vis tiek veikia. if ( $src['auto_off'] ) { return []; } $comp_cats = $this->companion_cat_slugs( $product_id ); if ( empty($comp_cats) ) return []; $max = (int)$this->opt('maxc',3); // v1.4.2: imame placia kandidatu aibe (tik ID), maišom PHP, filtruojam pagal source. // Priezastis: fulfillment source nustatomas runtime (ne viename meta lauke), // todel negalim filtruoti SQL'e. Kandidatu poolas ribotas (kompanionu subkategorijos). $candidate_ids = wc_get_products([ 'status' => 'publish', 'limit' => -1, 'exclude' => [ $product_id ], 'stock_status' => 'instock', 'category' => $comp_cats, 'return' => 'ids', ]); if ( empty($candidate_ids) ) return []; shuffle( $candidate_ids ); // Saugiklis: ribojam resolve kvietimu skaiciu (jei kategorija labai didele) if ( count($candidate_ids) > 150 ) { $candidate_ids = array_slice( $candidate_ids, 0, 150 ); } $ids = []; foreach ( $candidate_ids as $cid ) { $p = wc_get_product( $cid ); if ( ! $p || ! $p->is_purchasable() ) continue; // HARD FILTER: tik tas pats fulfillment source. Jokio fallback i kita sandeli. if ( $filter_by_source ) { $cand = Petshop_Fulfillment_Source::resolve( (int) $cid ); $cand_source = isset($cand['source']) ? $cand['source'] : null; if ( $cand_source !== $main_source ) continue; } $ids[] = $cid; if ( count($ids) >= $max ) break; } return $ids; } private function discount_for( $product ) { // Jau akcijoje? FBT nuolaida netaikoma (be dvigubos nuolaidos). if ( $product->is_on_sale() ) return 0; $default=(float)$this->opt('discount',0); $rules=$this->cat_rules(); if ( empty($rules) ) return $default; $m=[]; foreach ($this->product_cat_slugs($product->get_id()) as $s) if (isset($rules[$s])) $m[]=(float)$rules[$s]; return ! empty($m) ? min($m) : $default; } /* ===================== FRONTEND ===================== */ public function render_widget() { if ( $this->opt('enabled','1')!=='1' ) return; global $product; if ( ! $product instanceof WC_Product ) return; if ( ! $product->is_purchasable() || ! $product->is_in_stock() ) return; $companions = $this->get_companions( $product->get_id() ); if ( empty($companions) ) return; $precheck = $this->opt('precheck','1')==='1'; $heading = $this->opt('heading','Dažnai perkama kartu'); $note = $this->opt('note','Perkant kartu – papildomoms prekėms taikoma nuolaida!'); $rows=[]; $rows[]=['id'=>$product->get_id(),'name'=>$product->get_name(),'img'=>$product->get_image('thumbnail'), 'price'=>(float)$product->get_price(),'charge'=>(float)$product->get_price(),'is_main'=>true,'pct'=>0]; foreach ( $companions as $cid ) { $cp=wc_get_product($cid); if(!$cp) continue; if ( $cp->is_on_sale() ) { // Jau akcijoje — rodom esamą akcijos nuolaidą (be papildomos FBT) $full = (float)$cp->get_regular_price(); $charge = (float)$cp->get_price(); $pct = ( $full>0 && $charge<$full ) ? round((1-$charge/$full)*100) : 0; } else { // Ne akcijoje — FBT kategorijos nuolaida $full = (float)$cp->get_price(); $pct = $this->discount_for($cp); $charge = round($full*(1-$pct/100),2); } $rows[]=['id'=>$cid,'name'=>$cp->get_name(),'img'=>$cp->get_image('thumbnail'), 'price'=>$full,'charge'=>$charge,'is_main'=>false,'pct'=>$pct]; } $nonce = wp_create_nonce('petshop_fbt_add'); ?>

WC()->cart->add_to_cart($main) ) wp_send_json_error(['msg'=>'Nepavyko pridėti pagrindinės prekės.']); // v1.4.3: patikra per is_valid_companion() — STABILI (be shuffle). // Anksciau cia buvo get_companions(), kuris naudoja shuffle() -> AJAX metu // grazindavo KITUS ID nei render metu -> in_array() FALSE -> kompanionai // praleisti. Dabar tikrinam ar kiekvienas $cid APSKRITAI leidziamas. foreach ( $comps as $cid ) { if ( ! $this->is_valid_companion( $main, $cid ) ) continue; $cp=wc_get_product($cid); if(!$cp||!$cp->is_purchasable()||!$cp->is_in_stock()) continue; $is_sub=class_exists('WC_Subscriptions_Product')&&WC_Subscriptions_Product::is_subscription($cp); $pct=$is_sub?0:$this->discount_for($cp); $data=[]; if($pct>0){$data[self::CART_FLAG]=$pct;$data[self::CART_BASE]=(float)$cp->get_price();$data[self::CART_MAIN]=$main;} WC()->cart->add_to_cart($cid,1,0,[],$data); } wp_send_json_success(['cart_url'=>wc_get_cart_url()]); } /* ===================== KREPŠELIS ===================== */ private function main_in_cart( $main_id, $cart = null ) { $cart = $cart ?: ( WC()->cart ?? null ); if ( ! $cart ) return false; foreach ( $cart->get_cart() as $i ) { if ( (int)$i['product_id']===(int)$main_id || (int)$i['variation_id']===(int)$main_id ) return true; } return false; } public function apply_discount( $cart ) { if ( is_admin() && ! defined('DOING_AJAX') ) return; foreach ( $cart->get_cart() as $item ) { if ( empty($item[self::CART_FLAG]) ) continue; // Nuolaida galioja tik kol krepšelyje yra pagrindinė prekė $main = isset($item[self::CART_MAIN]) ? (int)$item[self::CART_MAIN] : 0; if ( $main && ! $this->main_in_cart($main,$cart) ) continue; // pašalinta -> normali kaina $pct=(float)$item[self::CART_FLAG]; $base=isset($item[self::CART_BASE])?(float)$item[self::CART_BASE]:(float)$item['data']->get_price(); if ( $pct<=0||$base<=0 ) continue; // v1.4.1: nuolaida taikoma max 3 vnt. vienam kompanionui. // Jei qty > 3 → per-unit kaina apskaičiuojama kaip svertinis vidurkis // (3 vnt. su nuolaida + likę vnt. normalia kaina). Total skaičiuojamas teisingai. $qty = (int) $item['quantity']; $max_discounted_qty = 3; if ( $qty <= $max_discounted_qty ) { $item['data']->set_price( round( $base * ( 1 - $pct / 100 ), 2 ) ); } else { $discounted_total = $max_discounted_qty * $base * ( 1 - $pct / 100 ); $full_total = ( $qty - $max_discounted_qty ) * $base; $effective = ( $discounted_total + $full_total ) / $qty; $item['data']->set_price( round( $effective, 2 ) ); } } } public function cart_item_label( $data, $item ) { // 1) FBT pridėtos prekės su FBT nuolaida → "Perkant kartu: −X% nuolaida" if ( ! empty($item[self::CART_FLAG]) ) { $main = isset($item[self::CART_MAIN]) ? (int)$item[self::CART_MAIN] : 0; if ( $main && ! $this->main_in_cart($main) ) return $data; // nerodom nuolaidos, jei pagrindinės nebėra $pct=rtrim(rtrim((string)(float)$item[self::CART_FLAG],'0'),'.'); // v1.4.1: jei qty > 3, parodom kad nuolaida taikoma tik 3 vnt. $qty = (int) $item['quantity']; if ( $qty > 3 ) { $data[]=['name'=>'Perkant kartu','value'=>'−'.$pct.'% (taikoma 3 iš '.$qty.' vnt.)']; } else { $data[]=['name'=>'Perkant kartu','value'=>'−'.$pct.'% nuolaida']; } return $data; } // 2) v1.4.0 — Akcijinės prekės (ne per FBT) → "Akcija: −X%" $product = isset($item['data']) ? $item['data'] : null; if ( $product && is_a($product, 'WC_Product') && $product->is_on_sale() ) { $regular = (float) $product->get_regular_price(); $sale = (float) $product->get_price(); if ( $regular > 0 && $sale < $regular ) { $pct = (int) round( ( $regular - $sale ) / $regular * 100 ); if ( $pct > 0 ) { $data[] = ['name' => 'Akcija', 'value' => '−' . $pct . '%']; } } } return $data; } public function restore_cart_item( $item, $values ) { if ( isset($values[self::CART_FLAG]) ) $item[self::CART_FLAG]=$values[self::CART_FLAG]; if ( isset($values[self::CART_BASE]) ) $item[self::CART_BASE]=$values[self::CART_BASE]; if ( isset($values[self::CART_MAIN]) ) $item[self::CART_MAIN]=$values[self::CART_MAIN]; return $item; } } new Petshop_FBT();
